content.body: Working through the consolidation exercise again for storage there are a few items which are not storage specific, and are likely to come up in any and all functional areas. What's the best way to manage these?

Specifically I have:

- SBOM

1

- Don't log potential Security/PII data

12.1

- Document interfaces

10.1

- Follow standards

10.2
